name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added UniBridge_AssetIntelligence Action=SemanticDiff, a read-only semantic diff for Unity YAML/text assets such as prefabs, scenes, materials, controllers, .asset files, and .meta files.
- SemanticDiff reports YAML document created/deleted/modified counts, class/fileID changes, property deltas, GUID/script reference changes, risk summary, and bounded line diff samples.
- Added searchable aliases including semantic_asset_diff, asset_semantic_diff, yaml_semantic_diff, unity_yaml_diff, prefab_semantic_diff, asset_diff, and semantic_diff.

### Previous Changes

- ToolGuide, ContextSnapshot, DomainCatalog, and Discover expose agent-facing playbooks with read-before-modify, scope awareness, safe execution, and verification ladder guidance.
- UniBridge_RuntimeProfiler Action=Hierarchy exports bounded profiler marker hierarchy/top-sample data for AI performance triage.
- UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=ChangeImpact compares current C# source with ProposedSource or ProposedPath before large edits and reports syntax, API, serialized field, Unity callback, source-delta, and reload risks.
- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence and UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence provide bounded YAML reference locations for asset/script GUID usages.
